dialogos.texto_en: Why do you have such a serious expression?\nWhat are you looking at?
Ah, Uesugi-kun?\nI was just thinking about something.
Is that a fake food display from some restaurant?\nWhat, are you already hungry?
Well, it's almost lunchtime.\nI was looking for a good lunch spot.
(Talking about food,\n does that mean this is the actual Itsuki?\n Or, maybe a quintuplet acting like her...)
We did come to the American Village,\nso I thought American-style food would be good...
Even one serving is quite a lot.\nJust looking at it gives me heartburn.
That's an American breakfast, right?
This is the morning menu...\nAmericans eat this much in the morning, huh.
The lunch menus and standard meals are over here.
Again, what in the world is this...?\nIs the size of this hamburger wrong?
Indeed, this amount would be tough.
How rare.\nI thought you'd be able\nto wolf something like this down, you know?
...You really are such a rude person, you know that?
Your big appetite is a well-known fact, you know?\nThere's no point in hiding it now.
Uesugi-kun.\nI won't forgive you for what you just said today.
Huh?
Don't give me 'huh!'\nMaking jokes about being a big eater?\nIs that what you think of me?!
(Th-this is bad!\n Did I really make her angry with my joke?!)
It was just a little joke.\nDon't get so mad.
You think you can just brush it off as a joke?\nI'm angry about the fact\nthat you would even joke about that kind of thing!
Ooo... I'm sorry,\nI definitely went too far with that.\nI apologize.
But seriously, your lack of delicacy\nalways makes my jaw drop.
I'm worried about whether you'll be able to\nlive in society without causing trouble.
...Am I really that horrible of a person?
Well, you should reflect on your usual behavior too.
You're gonna keep this up?!
I mean, just calm down for a moment.\nWhere there's smoke, there's fire.
Ooh...\nYeah, I guess...\nI might have a bit of a problem there...
Well, I admit I also might have gone too far.\nWe both gotta be a little more careful, okay?
...Alright.\nLet's call it even this time.
But seriously, your lack of delicacy\nalways makes my jaw drop.
I'm worried about whether you'll be able to\nlive in society without causing trouble.
...Am I really that horrible of a person?
Sorry, I went a little too far.
...Do you really think that?
Yeah, my bad. There are things you can and can't say\nto even close friends, after all.
That's right.\nYou do have trouble with that...
Well, let's give credit where it's due.\nYou were honest with your apology.
But seriously, your lack of delicacy\nalways makes my jaw drop.
I'm worried about whether you'll be able to\nlive in society without causing trouble.
...Am I really that horrible of a person?
You are!
My goodness...\nI'm even more worried\nnow that you didn't even realize that.
(I that's a bit of an exaggeration, but...\n now that we've finally made up,\n I should probably keep quiet.)
